summary: Amendment A5 Party Ledger Module testing completed. Backend: 17/18 tests passed (94%). Frontend: All Party Ledger UI components visible and functional. Fixed 2 backend bugs (route order + datetime.date MongoDB encoding). Frontend parties API times out intermittently in Playwright tests but works via curl.

minor.issue: Route was being matched by {party_id} param - FIXED by moving route before dynamic route
datetime.date objects cannot be encoded by MongoDB - FIXED by converting to ISO strings

integration_issues.issue: Parties API times out intermittently in Playwright browser (10s timeout) but responds in 0.3s via curl. Likely browser/network latency.

party_master_crud.api_tests: All 6 Party CRUD tests passed (list, create, get, update, search, delete)
party_master_crud.ui_tests: Page loads, Add Party drawer works, form fields present

party_ledger_list.api_tests: GET /api/party-ledger with FY filter returns data correctly
party_ledger_list.ui_tests: Party Ledger page accessible, FY filter dropdown visible

invoice_party_field.ui_tests: Party Name (for Ledger) field visible, Same as Farmer checkbox works

invoice_party_autocomplete.api_tests: Invoice created with party_id links to ledger correctly

available_fys_endpoint.api_tests: GET /api/party-ledger/available-fys returns ['25-26'] correctly after route fix

action_items: INVESTIGATE: Frontend parties page intermittent timeout (works via curl, times out in Playwright)
critical_code_review_comments: Route order fixed: /api/party-ledger/available-fys now defined BEFORE /api/party-ledger/{party_id}
datetime.date objects converted to .isoformat() strings before MongoDB storage in payment/manual-entry endpoints
Invoice Form correctly includes party_id and party_name_text fields with autocomplete dropdown
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed route order and datetime encoding

success_rate.backend: 94% (17/18 tests passed, 1 skipped - push_invoice test skipped due to test data dependency)
success_rate.frontend: 85% - All A5 features visible, intermittent timeout on parties page load

seed_data_creation: Test parties created by pytest tests (prefixed with TEST_), test party 'SAI RAM AQUA TRADERS' exists with ledger data
context_for_next_testing_agent: A5 Party Ledger module is working. Backend tests in test_party_ledger_a5.py. Fixed 2 critical bugs: route order and datetime encoding. Frontend intermittent timeout on parties page may be network/browser related - backend responds in <1s.

route_order_bug.issue: GET /api/party-ledger/available-fys was returning 'Party not found' error
route_order_bug.root_cause: FastAPI route /api/party-ledger/{party_id} was defined before /available-fys, causing 'available-fys' to be matched as a party_id
route_order_bug.fix: Moved /api/party-ledger/available-fys route definition BEFORE the dynamic {party_id} route

datetime_encoding_bug.issue: Payment and manual entry endpoints returning 500 Internal Server Error
datetime_encoding_bug.root_cause: datetime.date objects cannot be encoded by MongoDB's bson library - only datetime.datetime or strings
datetime_encoding_bug.fix: Added .isoformat() conversion for entry_date and payment_date fields before MongoDB insert
